name: Virginia-class Attack Submarine
description: Nuclear-powered fast attack submarine optimized for littoral and blue-water operations. Features advanced sonar, Tomahawk cruise missiles, and special operations support.

specialAbilities.name: Tomahawk Land-Attack
specialAbilities.description: Carries up to 40 Tomahawk cruise missiles for precision land-attack strikes from concealed positions.

specialAbilities.name: Silent Running
specialAbilities.description: Ultra-quiet pump-jet propulsion and advanced acoustic dampening make detection extremely difficult.
